hero.desc: Engineering systems, web applications, and digital experiences — each a chapter in the archive of craft.

gallery.desc: Each work is a distinct chapter — an artefact of engineering, design, and digital craft. Browse by discipline or explore the archive in full.

contact.title: Let's build something extraordinary.
contact.desc: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.

gb.title: Visitor's Log

gb.thanks: Thanks — your note is awaiting a quick review before it appears here.
gb.empty: No entries yet — be the first to sign it.

status.title: The Status Room
status.unreachable: The logbook is unreachable right now — the museum itself is evidently open, since you're reading this.

featured.title: Editor's Pick
featured.caption: The centrepiece of the current collection. Tap the card for the full story.

gallery.title: The Complete Collection
gallery.caption: Every exhibit in the archive — browse by discipline, open any card to read its plaque.

career.title: Career Journey
career.caption: The path that built the museum, milestone by milestone.

volunteering.title: Wing of Service
volunteering.caption: Contributions beyond the exhibits — organizing, mentoring, giving back.

testimonials.title: Visitor Remarks
testimonials.caption: Words from the people who worked alongside the curator.

guestbook.title: The Guestbook
guestbook.caption: Leave a note before you go — every signature joins the permanent record.

contact.title: The Curator's Desk
contact.caption: Commission a work, offer a role, or simply say hello.
